title: 02 Prt, Hun, Ita
zine-seo-title: 02 Prt, Hun, Ita - Scenes of Europe, Part 1 of 3: Thank You, Life by Luc Rousseau
zine-seo-description: Explore '02 Prt, Hun, Ita,' a zine by Luc Rousseau capturing street photography from Portugal, Hungary, and Italy. This collection, taken between July and October 2023, represents the first part of a nine-month journey. Discover carefully paired images harmonizing in color and style, reflecting Luc's profound sense of fulfillment and gratitude.
content:
02 Prt, Hun, Ita

This zine presents a collection of street photography I captured between late July and the end of October 2023, during the first three months of a nine-month, three-part journey. This section spans Portugal, Hungary, and Italy. While the photos aren't in chronological order, they've been carefully paired to harmonize in color and style.

I don't believe in calling it luck-l've made intentional choices to build the life I have. But as I look through this series of photos, I feel a profound sense of fulfillment, joy, and gratitude. I can honestly say I'm living my best life.
